title: thelypodium sagittatum subsp. sagittatum
intro: Thelypodium sagittatum subsp. sagittatum, also known as Squirrel Tail, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Thelypodium sagittatum subsp. sagittatum include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and ease digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine for its therapeutic properties.
